Romanization

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YEIN - Home

Romanization

I can not wait for the dawn to break
I’ve got no time
I’ll never truly be free
Until I see the light

Now I come out through the night
Finally open my sight
I have been tired and worn out
Drop everything and go out

Run
Running, running, running, running
Run
Running, running, running, running

Falling is easy, I used to say
Maybe I’m right
I wasn’t sure if I could be
The one I desire

Now I come out through the night
Finally open my sight
I have been tired and worn out
Drop everything and go out

Run
Running, running, running, running
Run
Running, running, running, running

I run to the heaven when you say my name
It’s never too late
I run to the heaven when you say my name
Never going back
I run to the heaven when you say my name
It’s never too late

Never going back

isi.driveFileNames: Monsta X - before you met me.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monsta X - before you met me

Romanization

If you could be anybody else
Would you be yourself?
Before you met me
If you could be anybody else
Would you be yourself?
Before you let me
Turn ya into someone else

October
Wanna call to say, come over
Pictures in the frames
Where we were last New Year's Eve
You’re sober and I’m struggling
Cold shoulder
Give me nothing and that's okay
It’s my mistake to leave

Sorry if I ruined all that

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monsta X - growing pains

Romanization

I was just a kid when the lights found me
Chasing bigger dreams than my eyes could see
I’ve been learning to swim while I’m lost at sea
But I’ll rise

I left home behind when I was just eighteen
Poured my soul into the stage, thinking who I’ll be
And I’ve stumbled and fell, but I still believe
I’ll survive

Baby I’ll be okay
Living in this violet haze
One day I’ll understand
That I’m good as I am
I’m finding my way
Dealing with these growing pains

I’ll be okay
’Cause I know that in time I’ll change
All the strength I’ve found
I’m still standing now
I’m finding my way
Dealing with these growing pains

I’ve been crawling through fire just to find my feet
And I know everyone at home is still so proud of me
All the miles that I’ve run chasing destiny
I’ll be fine

’Cause I’ve stumbled through dreams and all of these hotels
Trying to find a different person but I’m someone else
Now the chains of my past baby can’t you tell
They ain’t holding me oh

That I’m good as I am

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monsta X - heal

Romanization

Dancing on a tightrope
Trying to keep my eyes closed
I don’t wanna hurt again
Such a good pretender
Can’t even remember
When I didn’t hold things in

Lying awake trying to make my brain slow down
We say we’re ok but we’re just afraid of the fallout

How can we, how can we heal our wounds
When they keep ripping open
How can we, how can we hear the truth when it’s
Never been spoken
How can we, how can we heal
When the love is what’s keeping us broken

I don’t wanna lose you
And you don’t wanna lose me
That much we know for sure
So how’d we end up like this
We’re dancing in the silence
Hearts bleeding on the floor

Holding you close but I know we both feel the distance
We keep holding on ’cause all could be lost in an instant

So how can we, how can we heal our wounds
When they keep ripping open
How can we, how can we hear the truth when it’s
Never been spoken
How can we, how can we heal
How can we, how can we heal
When the love is what’s keeping us broken

Tell me that you want me
Tell me that you need me
Tell me that you love me
Say you’ll never leave me

But how can we, how can we heal our wounds
When they keep ripping open
How can we, how can we hear the truth when it’s
Never been spoken

When they keep ripping open
How can we, how can we hear the truth when it’s
